creator: john@saltant.com
text:
Created attachment 193534
devel/subversion: Update "Sponsored by" microcopy

The attached patch aims to add a gentle hint to the committer to avoid crediting, or giving the impression of crediting, their own sponsor for the work of one or more collaborators. This improvement is also the topic of doc bug 228353.

I welcome feedback on how to improve this patch to optimize for the most effective reminder/prompt in minimum words. The expectation is that someone committing a patch that is entirely their own creation would do nothing differently, but that someone committing the product of a collaboration would amend the "Sponsored by" line to more precisely and equitably assign credit. See the description and patch of bug 228353 for details.
